figures.caption: Fig. 3: Sum of Global MSE across dimensions. The dashed line represents the baseline without bottleneck (2.5× 10−2).

Fig. 2: Method overview. A self-contained patch-token transformer maps the noised next-state zτ to a field-level prediction, conditioned on the history window xt−k+1:t, diffusion time, and parameters θ.
Fig. 1: Geometric assumption. Under the manifold assumption, physical states x ∈ X concentrate near a lowdimensional subset M ⊂ X , while injected noise ϵ ∼ N (0, I) is isotropic in X .
Fig. 5: Spectral fidelity of long rollouts. Temporal frequency spectrum of the downstream probe signal (log scale), comparing generated rollouts to the reference simulation.
